items.title: Local AI desktop coworker
items.oneliner: Open-source desktop app indexes mail, meetings, and chats locally, then runs agents and code beside your workflow.

items.title: Geospatial SQL for coding agents
items.oneliner: GitHub skill for Claude and Copilot that queries PostGIS, BigQuery, and Snowflake, then renders maps without SaaS.

items.title: Postgres pooler without session breakage
items.oneliner: Connection pooler preserves session state, SET commands, and RLS so you can scale Postgres without PgBouncer rewrites.

items.title: CPU-first local text to speech
items.oneliner: Hands-on guide shows Kokoro running locally on CPU with FastAPI, web UI, and Python and JavaScript examples.

items.title: SQLite migrations built into sqlite-utils
items.oneliner: sqlite-utils 4.0 adds schema migrations so SQLite apps can evolve tables in place without reset scripts.

items.title: Native Apple container desktop
items.oneliner: Free macOS app runs and inspects Linux containers on Apple silicon without Docker Desktop or admin access.

items.title: Go file search optimization walkthrough
items.oneliner: Detailed benchmark-driven tutorial takes a Go scanner from 0.75 GB/s to 49 GB/s with source code.

items.title: QR codes as a font
items.oneliner: Experimental TrueType font turns bracketed text into scannable QR glyphs while keeping surrounding text readable.

items.title: Minimal ZFS NAS build guide
items.oneliner: Practical walkthrough builds a lean ZFS NAS from open tools, covering hardware, snapshots, replication, and maintenance.

items.title: Peer to peer Git collaboration
items.oneliner: Decentralized Git platform adds native issues and patches, letting teams self-host code collaboration with offline replication.
